Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC., A12 DELAWARE CORPORATION Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
David Cook, Esq., (415) 989-4730, for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's unopposed motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
